title: GRIEF JOURNEY EXTENDED PROGRAM - 211info
text: LIVING UNDONE GRIEF JOURNEY EXTENDED PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers extended grief and bereavement counseling programs two times a year in the spring and fall. Sessions run for 12 weeks up to 12 months depending on the needs of the group. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 223-9955 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website FEES: $500 for four weeks. Sliding scale and scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Bereaved Child Support Groups Bereaved Parent Support Groups Bereavement and Grief Counseling General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF TRAVELERS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INDIVIDUAL GRIEF COUNSELING SESSIONS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TEEN GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIVING UNDONE
